// reporters: Tier2ImplicitThis.java.txt#Service.report
package com.consumer.svc;

// Implicit this: report(e) with no receiver resolves to a method the enclosing
// type declares, origin (com.consumer.svc, Service) - matching the declaration
// that names this file's own method, so the capture holds. An unqualified call
// to a name the type does not declare (and is not statically imported) has no
// origin and swallows.
class Service {
    void report(Throwable cause) {}

    void declaredIsCapture() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) {
            report(e);
        }
    }

    void undeclaredNameSwallows() {
        try {
            risky();
        } catch (Exception e) { // want "JV001"
            undeclared(e);
        }
    }

    void risky() throws Exception {}
}
